retry_reason: Failure during setup (e.g., page pool allocation) indicates resource exhaustion or configuration error; retrying without changes is unlikely to succeed.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is multi-step NAPI domain setup (page pool creation, ptr_ring init, napi_enable) for a range of queues; refcount operations are only incidental (page_pool_destroy in error path) and not the function's main objective.
